name: ALVEOLAR MICROLITHIASIS
definition: very rare disease of unknown etiology characterized by myriad of calcospherites (=
dominant_finding: thickening + micronodulation of interlobular septa ← innumerable microliths within
discriminating_features: very fine, sharply defined, sandstorm-like micronodular (< 1 mm) pattern
vertical linear radiolucency between ribs + lung parenchyma ← subpleural cystic changes

general: very fine, sharply defined, sandstorm-like micronodular (< 1 mm) pattern
vertical linear radiolucency between ribs + lung parenchyma ← subpleural cystic changes
HRCT: thickening + micronodulation of interlobular septa ← innumerable microliths within
thickened micronodular appearance of bronchovascular + subpleural interstitium
ground-glass appearance (of microliths < 1 mm) ± "crazy paving" pattern

clinical.Rx: NO effective treatment aside from lung transplant
